Class InMemoryRepository<ID, E extends Entity<ID>>

java.lang.Object
org.example.repository.InMemoryRepository<ID,E>
Type Parameters:
ID - the type of the entity identifier
E - the type of the entity, must extend Entity<ID>
All Implemented Interfaces:
Repository<ID,E>
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbstractFileRepository
public abstract class InMemoryRepository<ID, E extends Entity<ID>> extends Object implements Repository<ID,E>
Abstract in-memory repository for storing entities in a HashMap. Provides basic CRUD operations: add, remove, findById, and findAll.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    InMemoryRepository()
    Constructs a new in-memory repository with an empty storage map.

    Returns all entities stored in the repository.
    E

    Finds an entity by its ID.
    void
    remove(E entity)
    Removes an entity from the repository.

      public E findById(ID id)
      Finds an entity by its ID.
      Specified by:

      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the entity to find
      Returns:
      the entity with the given ID, or null if not found

    • findAll

      public Iterable<E> findAll()
      Returns all entities stored in the repository.
      Specified by:
      findAll in interface Repository<ID, E extends Entity<ID>>
      Returns:
      an iterable collection of all entities
